title: More Variants: Pale Oak Backport
description: Bringing Pale Oak Variants to 1.21.1 and 1.20.1
body:
[![purple badge that reads "a Creation by LieOn Studios"](https://assets.lieonstudios.dev/common/badges/label/lieon-studios-creation.svg)](https://modrinth.com/organization/lieonstudios) [![purple badge that informs the reader about the requirement of the mod "More Variants Core"](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/pnk2u/resources/main/ModProjects/More-Variants-Core/pres/badge/requires-mvcore.svg)](https://modrinth.com/mod/More-Variants-Core)               [![discord](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/LieOnLion/LieOnLion/main/images/badges/buttons/discord.svg)](https://discord.lieonlion.dev/) Source: [![github](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/LieOnLion/LieOnLion/main/images/badges/buttons/github.svg)](https://github.com/pnk2u/More-Variants-Pale-Oak-Backport) pnku: [![pnku.de](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/pnk2u/resources/main/ModProjects/shared/pres/icon/pnku_de_logo.svg)](https://www.pnku.de) [![modrinth](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/LieOnLion/LieOnLion/main/images/badges/buttons/modrinth.svg)](https://modrinth.com/user/pnku) [![curseforge](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/LieOnLion/LieOnLion/main/images/badges/buttons/curseforge.svg)](https://www.curseforge.com/members/pnku/) **Note**: A mod backporting the vanilla _**Pale Oak**_ wood type itself is also required!
This mod was tested using [Vanilla Backport](https://modrinth.com/mod/vanillabackport) but other mods backporting _**Pale Oak**_ should work just as well. ## More Variants: Pale Oak Backport Bringing _**Pale Oak** Variants_ for all¹ _More Variants_ mods to 1.21(.1) and 1.20.1. ![Presentation of a selection of the added Blocks and Items](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/pnk2u/resources/main/ModProjects/More-Variants-Pale-Oak-Backport/pres/mr_desc_banner.png) ### Bringing 105 _Pale Oak Variants_ to older versions > This is for everyone using mods that backport the _**Pale Oak**_ wood type to these older versions while also using our _More Variants_ mods such as [More Chest Variants](https://modrinth.com/mod/more-chest-variants-lieonlion), [More Crafting Tables](https://modrinth.com/mod/more-crafting-tables-lieonlion) or [More Barrel Variants](https://modrinth.com/mod/more-barrel-variants). ¹: The following mods are supported: > ²: Some mods require a minimum specific version. > |Mod|Min. Version²| > |--|--| > |[ More Barrel Variants](https://modrinth.com/mod/more-barrel-variants)|`2.0.3`| > |[ More Bed Variants](https://modrinth.com/mod/more-bed-variants)|`2.1.7`| > |[ More Beehive Variants](https://modrinth.com/mod/more-beehive-variants)|`-`| > |[ More Bookshelf Variants](https://modrinth.com/mod/more-bookshelf-variants-lieonlion)|`-`| > |[ More Cartography Tables](https://modrinth.com/mod/more-cartography-tables)|`-`| > |[ More Chiseled Bookshelf Variants](https://modrinth.com/mod/more-chiseled-bookshelf-variants)|`-`| > |[ More Chest Variants](https://modrinth.com/mod/more-chest-variants-lieonlion)|`-`| > |[ More Composter Variants](https://modrinth.com/mod/more-composter-variants)|`-`| > |[ More Crafter Variants](https://modrinth.com/mod/more-crafter-variants)|`-`| > |[ More Crafting Tables](https://modrinth.com/mod/more-crafting-tables-lieonlion)|`-`| > |[ More Fletching Variants](https://modrinth.com/mod/more-jukebox-noteblock-variants)|`-`| > |[ More Lectern Variants](https://modrinth.com/mod/more-lectern-variants)|`-`| > |[ More Loom
